2605.23033.title: Uncovering the Latent Potential of Deep Intermediate Representations
2605.23033.paper_summary: Foundational Models pretrained on huge amount of data learn representations that evolve across depth, forming a hierarchy of embeddings with distinct semantic content and geometric structure. Contrary to the widespread practice of using only the final layer or shallow mixtures, we show that task-relevant information is distributed non-monotonically across layers and cannot be recovered by naïve aggregation. Through a geometric and empirical study across multiple modalities, we show that effective transfer depends on identifying which layers encode task-discriminative structure and how their embeddings are geometrically organized. We introduce Layer-wise Optimal Embedding Selection (LOES), a constructive spectral method that identifies task-discriminative subspaces by minimizing residual error under orthogonality and isotropy constraints. To align fine-tuning with this selection principle, we further propose Geometric Regularization Loss (GeoReg), which enforces a simplicial structure on class manifolds and stabilizes representation geometry during fine-tuning. Across a wide range of architectures, depths, modalities, and data regimes, LOES consistently outperforms standard baselines, with gains that grow as model depth increases. Beyond accuracy, our method reveals how semantic factors are distributed across layers, thereby enabling cross-lingual and cross-modal interpretability analyses. Together, our results provide strong evidence that layerwise embedding geometry is not incidental but central to how deep models represent and transfer knowledge.
2605.23033.paper_summary_zh: 基礎模型在大量數據上預訓練，學習的表示隨著深度而演變，形成具有不同語義內容和幾何結構的嵌入層次。與普遍只使用最終層或淺層混合的做法相反，我們展示了與任務相關的信息在層之間以非單調方式分佈，並且無法通過天真的聚合來恢復。通過對多種模態進行幾何和實證研究，我們表明有效的轉移依賴於識別哪些層編碼了任務區分結構以及它們的嵌入是如何在幾何上組織的。我們引入了層級最佳嵌入選擇（LOES），這是一種建設性的光譜方法，通過在正交性和各向同性約束下最小化殘差誤差來識別任務區分子空間。為了使微調與這一選擇原則對齊，我們進一步提出了幾何正則化損失（GeoReg），該方法在類別流形上強制執行簡單結構，並在微調過程中穩定表示幾何。在各種架構、深度、模態和數據範疇中，LOES 一直優於標準基準，並且隨著模型深度的增加而增長的增益。除了準確性，我們的方法還揭示了語義因素在層之間的分佈，從而使跨語言和跨模態的可解釋性分析成為可能。總體而言，我們的結果提供了強有力的證據，表明層級嵌入幾何不是偶然的，而是深度模型如何表示和轉移知識的核心。
2605.23033.author: Arnesh Batra et.al.
2605.23033.authors: Arnesh Batra, Arush Gumber, Aniket Khandelwal, Jashn Khemani, Anubha Gupta
